command: PLAN_ID="plan-lLstEEq"; for i in $(seq 1 30); do status=$(PYTHONWARNINGS=ignore exophial plan get $PLAN_ID 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('status','?'))" 2>/dev/null); echo "$(date +%H:%M:%S) $status"; if [ "$status" = "succeeded" ] || [ "$status" = "failed" ]; then break; fi; sleep 10; done

uvx --from base58 python3 -c "
import base64, base58

cid = 'QmRx3hb4kv8oPQZhrZtu849j4759QAQxwuwhFK9vLeMnsF'
multihash = base58.b58decode(cid)
print(f'Multihash hex: {multihash.hex()}')

# go uses base32.RawStdEncoding = RFC 4648 standard base32, no padding
b32 = base64.b32encode(multihash).decode().rstrip('=')
print(f'S3 key: blocks/{b32}')
"

description: Check if _ff_plan_to_main was changed by me
